text.title: Onion Architecture Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the arch-pattern-onion methodology end-to-end.

step.name: design-domain-model
step.action: Build entities, value objects, aggregates in Domain.Model layer.

step.name: add-domain-services
step.action: Add Domain Services for behaviour spanning aggregates.

step.name: wire-application-services
step.action: Add Application Services that orchestrate domain to fulfil use cases.

step.name: add-infra-ui-tests
step.action: Add Infrastructure / UI / Tests; outermost ring; depends on Application.

step.name: enforce-direction
step.decision-gate: If lint unavailable for stack, block — adopt one first.
